    596085*X^39*Y + 70108209360*X^39 - 272090*X^38*Y + 108345969504*X^38 - 671132*X^37*Y + 121198179480*X^37 + 969290*X^36*Y + 
    155029457048*X^36 - 1612065*X^35*Y + 97918126080*X^35 + 2493785*X^34*Y + 141722714700*X^34 + 647290*X^33*Y - 1509796288*X^33 - 
    3217739*X^32*Y + 108236157813*X^32 + 3033590*X^31*Y - 93954247716*X^31 - 5781615*X^30*Y + 91135898154*X^30 + 1744085*X^29*Y - 
    108382009680*X^29 + 1645840*X^28*Y + 66862445601*X^28 - 2260650*X^27*Y - 66642524048*X^27 + 6807810*X^26*Y + 38019611082*X^26 - 
    2737140*X^25*Y - 28638526644*X^25 + 2182740*X^24*Y + 17438539150*X^24 - 125335*X^23*Y - 8820058716*X^23 - 1729889*X^22*Y + 
    5404139562*X^22 + 1024275*X^21*Y - 1967888032*X^21 - 1121960*X^20*Y + 1183191681*X^20 + 395675*X^19*Y - 370697040*X^19 -

    1120*X^14*Y - 4585140*X^14 - 176*X^13*Y + 1313040*X^13 + X^12*Y^2 - 1486*X^12*Y - 38632*X^12 - 7*X^11*Y + 399000*X^11 -
